greatest_gift_of_gaia.description: Gain the power to automatically harvest any resource in each Location whenever you exit.

description_rich.value: Gain the power to automatically harvest any resource in each Location whenever you exit.

prerequisites_rich.value: Collect all seeds, flora, ores and fish, including chaos variants
Use the Silver Spade and Crescent Pick over 100 times each
Use Tablet of Peace and Rod of Fishing over 50 times each

empath_s_intuition.name: Empath's Intuition
empath_s_intuition.description: Update the Book of Shadows with insight into relationship status with one's acquaintances.

summoning_of_musical_rhapsody.name: Summoning of Musical Rhapsody
summoning_of_musical_rhapsody.description: Persuade the Music Maker to appear, who can perform a variety of renowned melodies.

shuffling_of_noted_ballads.name: Shuffling of Noted Ballads
shuffling_of_noted_ballads.description: Induce the Music Maker to optionally choose which melodies to play based on whim alone.

summoning_of_historic_travails.description: Persuade the Learned Sage to appear, with whom you may review the outcomes of your every night.

returning_to_a_real_possibility.name: Returning to a Real Possibility
returning_to_a_real_possibility.description: Reminisce at the Fountain of the Dead to return to the earliest point in your journey, if you wish.

description_rich.value: Reminisce at the Fountain of the Dead to return to the earliest point in your journey, if you wish.

greater_removal_of_rubbish.name: Greater Removal of Rubbish
greater_removal_of_rubbish.description: Make it so whenever you collect Rubbish, you automatically collect the rest in the vicinity.

, you automatically collect the rest in the vicinity.
